name: 1ST SOURCE CORP
summary: The provided text is an auditor consent exhibit (Exhibit 23) from 1st Source Corporation's 10-K filing, not a business description. It documents Forvis Mazars, LLP's consent to incorporate their audit reports into various SEC registration statements. No specific business operations, products, or services of 1st Source Corporation are described in this excerpt.

partnerships.description: Independent registered public accounting firm providing audit reports for 1st Source Corporation's consolidated financial statements and internal control over financial reporting.
